arts.ttl: ‘Bring me the bill’: Pep Guardiola makes gesture to Manchester City fans
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has made a gesture to a Manchester City supporters’ group planning to unfurl a banner at their Premier League clash with Fulham on Saturday, 5 October, urging the 53-year-old to stay on as manager.

arts.ttl: Man City line-up vs Fulham predicted as Phil Foden decision made amid Erling Haaland injury clarity
arts.sum: Manchester City are in Premier League action against Fulham on Saturday

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man City 'send scouts' to watch 22-year-old playmaker
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester City reportedly track Georgiy Sudakov, who has made a strong start to the season for Shakhtar Donetsk.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Fulham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Of course, their 4-0 victory over Slovan Bratislava in the Champions League midweek has offered some respite from a difficult period - by Man City's standards anyway - especially considering the returning Phil Foden grabbed a well-taken goal in an impressive display. The Cityzens have dropped points to Arsenal and Newcastle United in their most recent league outings, with Rodri's season-ending injury forcing uncomfortable questions regarding their significant reliance on the Euro 2024 winner.

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Fulham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City welcome Fulham to the Etihad this weekend hoping to return to winning ways. Successive draws with Arsenal and Newcastle have seen the Citizens slip to second, a point behind leaders Liverpool in the Premier League table. arts.ttl: Saturday's Transfer Talk Update: Ben Chilwell, Jhon Duran, Erling Haaland
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Man City target €32m Rodri replacement for January
arts.sum: The 23-year-old Argentine has drawn significant interest from the Premier League champions as they look for a potential signing in the January transfer window to replace the Rodi, who is out for the season after sustaining an ACL and meniscus damage to his knee in the 2-2 draw with Arsenal. However, sources close to the club suggest that City not only see Varela as a temporary replacement but also as someone who could partner Rodri when he returns to full fitness.

arts.ttl: Why Pep Guardiola Wants Start of 2025 Premier League Season Delayed
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola wants the Premier League to delay the start of next season for Man City due to the 2025 FIFA Club World Cup.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola responds to Premier League rejecting Man City request - and hits out at FIFA
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola was less than impressed with the Premier League rejecting Manchester City's request for next season as he also hit out at FIFA ahead of the Club World Cup
